title: Count Vowel Substrings of a String
titleCn: 统计字符串中的元音子字符串

testcases.input: word = "aeiouu" Output: 2 Explanation: The vowel substrings of word are as follows (underlined): - "aeiouu" - "aeiouu"
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The vowel substrings of word are as follows (underlined): - "aeiouu" - "aeiouu

testcases.input: word = "unicornarihan" Output: 0 Explanation: Not all 5 vowels are present, so there are no vowel substrings.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Not all 5 vowels are present, so there are no vowel substrings.

testcases.input: word = "cuaieuouac" Output: 7 Explanation: The vowel substrings of word are as follows (underlined): - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac"
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: The vowel substrings of word are as follows (underlined): - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac" - "cuaieuouac
